chapter_title.en: The Rights of Allah against oneself

text: وَأَمَّا حَقُّ بَطْنِكَ فَأَنْ لا تَجْعَلَهُ وِعَاءً لِلْحَرَامِ وَلا تَزيد على الشَّبْعَ.

en.william-c-chittick: The right of your stomach is that you make it not into a container for that which is unlawful to you and you eat no more after you become full.
